title: Soft Stepping
description: An enchantment to silence several vibrations
body:
# Soft Stepping is a new enchantment which silences several vibrations from Sculk & Warden detection. ![Soft Stepping Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4vAvcpEl/images/6f36795da258d1e6f8b7ce3c07cb49d5991157c8.png) **Follow the link below and use code "JACKBUSTERS" at checkout for 25% off server hosting.** [![Rent a server discount](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ba99da02-fd57-4ccc-89a5-9a5bba0922d2.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/jackbusters?r=Soft+Stepping+Modrinth) **The Silenced Vibrations Are:** - Stepping - Hitting the ground - Shooting a projectile (The vibration from the projectile's landing will still be detected) - Equipping armor **How to obtain:** - This enchantment is obtained by venturing into an Ancient City. From there, it can be found in chests. - It is effective only when applied to a pair of boots. **Config:** - Chance of generation [How likely an enchantment book with this enchantment is to generate in an ancient city chest] - Tradeability [Whether or not librarians can generate trades with this enchantment] **Enchantment Descriptions:**
Soft Stepping is compatible with the Enchantment Descriptions mod. **Similar Mods:**
Some other mods I made which have similar functionality, but are executed differently. - [Warden Walkers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/warden-walkers) - [Wooled Boots](https://modrinth.com/mod/wooled-boots)
